prep.summary: Your architecture team faces severe capacity constraints—having lost three key resources—while managing high-friction friction points like Track 3 production pushes and TVO bypassing standard intake. Shifting low-level tasks to engineering benches and leveraging Chris’s return at 75% will be critical to moving from a reactive—'treading water'—state to strategic governance. You must also align with newly onboarded leaders like Sanil to navigate the upcoming Foundry pilot and the projected 50% budget cuts in Claims for 2027.
tasks: Rebalance team workloads immediately by offloading low-level design tasks to the engineering benches—specifically targeting the strong Auto domain bench—to protect architecture capacity.
Establish formal engagement rules with TVO and Sanil's organization to prevent them from bypassing standard intake pipelines—such as Jira and Clarity—with rogue pilots.
Define the technical integration path for Track 3 out-of-the-box AWS capabilities with the Conversant desktop to resolve the ongoing 'swirl' across Charlotte's, Jim's, and Brian's teams.
Formulate a mitigation plan for the projected 50% budget cut in Claims for 2027 by coordinating with Mike on VAU property architecture and utilizing Chris’s 75% capacity for data support.
prep.title: P&C IT Staff (Directs Only)
